description: Local four-phase TBC model with one parameterized wedge-shaped crack in the YSZ layer.
notes: The y-domain is 101 um, not 100 um, so the 5 um crack bottom can be represented by exactly 5 centered 1 um voxels.
The voxel label volume is for geometry definition, checks, morphology, and visualization; COMSOL should build a continuous parametric geometry and generate an adaptive FE mesh for mechanics.
The wedge included angle derived from widths and depth is recorded in metadata and should be checked against the advisor note that mentions about 8.5 degrees.
